optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8888/sparql/
# Predicates: 3
#   <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/start> (http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/expression_exon_result -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [57.4M triples]
#   <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/stop> (http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/expression_exon_result -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [57.4M triples]
#   <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/chromosome> (http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/expression_exon_result -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [57.4M triples]

optimized_federated_query:
# Smart Federated Query with Class Constraints
# Variables are constrained by inferred class types and grouped by endpoint

SELECT DISTINCT ?chromosome ?geneExpVal ?geneId ?lookupChromosome ?patient ?recordNo ?s ?start ?stop ?uri
WHERE {

  SERVICE <http://localhost:8888/sparql/> {
    ?geneId <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/chromosome> ?lookupChromosome . # ?geneId:expression_exon_result, ?lookupChromosome:Literal
    ?recordNo <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/chromosome> ?chromosome . # ?recordNo:expression_exon_result, ?chromosome:Literal
    ?recordNo <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/start> ?start . # ?recordNo:expression_exon_result, ?start:Literal
    ?recordNo <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/stop> ?stop . # ?recordNo:expression_exon_result, ?stop:Literal
    ?geneId <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/expression_gene_lookup> .
    ?s <http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:x-geneid> ?geneId .
    ?s <http://bio2rdf.org/affymetrix_vocabulary:x-symbol> <http://bio2rdf.org/symbol:KRAS> .
    ?patient <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/result> ?recordNo .
    ?recordNo <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/scaled_estimate> ?geneExpVal .
    ?uri <http://tcga.deri.ie/schema/bcr_patient_barcode> ?patient .
  }
}
LIMIT 1000
